      • n***d (1162)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past 6 months
        Verified purchase
        Used item exactly as described. Seller negotiated on price. Ordered & paid Friday, delivery received Monday. Item was well wrapped & arrived intact. I'm very satisfied with this transaction & would happily buy again from this seller.
        (Wi1) Vanguard Supreme 46F Camera Case With Foam (#397085439848)
      • d***a (22)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past month
        Verified purchase
        Very well packaged. Swift delivery. I had a minor issue with what I ordered but the seller was swift in resolving the issue with multiple option given to me on how to proceed, highly recommend this seller and will keep an eye out for other great value deals on this page.
        (Pa2) Meta Quest 2 / 128GB (#397482386939)
      • e***_ (26)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past month
        Verified purchase
        Seller was quick to respond and send parcel, arrived quicker than expected and packaged very carefully, absolutely nothing wrong with item (was as described) definitely recommend purchasing from this seller, was noted as having light scratches but they were nearly invisible and nothing wrong with the hardware
        (Pa2) Sony PlayStation 5 Slim: Digital Edition - 1TB - Boxed (#397479357344)
      • 9***u (75)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past month
        Verified purchase
        The guitar arrived and it was as described and shown in the pictures .it was well packaged and great value .it arrived in 2 days from purchace.
        (Pa2) Black Encore Strat Style Electric Guitar (#357871963927)
      • s***b (17)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past 6 months
        Verified purchase
        Great experience! The item arrived exactly as described and in perfect condition. The packaging was very secure — they added plenty of protective materials to make sure nothing could get damaged in transit. Really happy with the purchase and would definitely recommend this seller. 5 stars! Postage was good as well, came quickly with a trusted courier.
        (SO4) BaBylissMEN 10 In 1 All Over Grooming Trimer Kit (#357693968379)
      • i***t (6)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past month
        Verified purchase
        Perfect item as described, very well packed for the price. Postage was very quick and communication was brilliant. A*** Seller
        (Pa2) Erbauer 2 x Cordless Drill Set - 2 x 5Ah Battery With Charger (#358046093925)
      • o***9 (422)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past 6 months
        Verified purchase
        Very pleased with the laptop. Exactly as described. Very quick delivery and very well packaged. The 'one tiny mark on the laptop' in the description was so small you'd miss it if you blinked...but kudos for pointing it out. I highly recommend this seller!
        (Wi1) AOC Acemagic RX16 Laptop - Ryzen 7 - 16gb Ram - 512GB SSD (#357887161604)
      • t***o (506)- Feedback left by buyer.
        Past 6 months
        Verified purchase
        Postage was free 5⭐. Packaging looked solid but was lots of bubblewrap leading to one of the corners being bent. But, good value for money and I was looking to buy this record second hand as I didn't need any of my money going to KW. going forward may I suggest mailers. They have a 95% success rate. A-
        (SO4) My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy 12" Vinyl Record (#357943569788)
